chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5340 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No. 3611/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 Mr. Javed Haleem Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh 1. Urgency granted. 2. This matter pertains to assertion of rights in immovable property and the Petitioner seeks certain demarcation, issuance of forms etc. The said prayer does not warrant direct recourse as adequate remedy is available under the law. In so far as prayer clause (c) and (d) are concerned, they pertain to harassment and cannot be granted in writ jurisdiction in view of judgment reported as PLD 2019 Karachi 168. In view of above, petition is found to be misconceived and is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
